titleStmt.title: SII 26.787: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 787. (A.R. No. 736 of 1909.) PŪRATTUKŌYIL, KULITTALAI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Bhujabalarāya: Śaka 1414, Paridhāvi, Aṟpaśi 12 = 1492 A.D., October 11. (Thursday).

summary.p: This inscription is damaged and is incomplete.

It appears to record the endowment of a dancing girl and some other service people to the temple of [•••••]ṉāṟ of Kaḍuvaṉkuḍi-nāḍu and the assignment to them the sutantiram, made tax-free, from the temple and from the nāḍu.

It is stated that Koḍumbaināyaka-vēḷār Śīmāṉpiḷḷai Maṉṟa [••••] of Koḍumbāḷūr, the accountant of the nāḍu wrote the record as directed by the taṉam (trust-board) and the nāḍu (the executive of the division).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmaṉ puyapelarāyaṟkuc cellāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 10 4 mel
cellāniṉṟa paritāpi varuṣam Aṟpaci mātam 10 2 kaṭuvaṉkuṭināṭṭu Uṭaiyār
ṉāṟku tevaraṭimai Āka nāṭṭāmaṅkalattu cupaḷḷi
perumāḷ nayiṉār taṉ kavayiravanācci Uyya cai
ppa māṇikkattāḷ taṉpiḷḷai Āka koṇṭiṭṭa Antakālantatacā
ṇakkaṉum Ivvaṉaivaṟkum nālu koyilu Iṟaiyili koyiṟ cutantiram
ccutantiram nāṭṭuccutantiram peṟakkaṭavarākavum Ippaṭikku tāṉamum nāṭum colla Eḻutiṉāṉ
ṉāṭṭuk kaṇakku koṭumpāḷūruṭaiyāṉ koṭumpaināyakaveḷār cimāṉpiḷḷai maṉṟa
yār Eḻuttu Upa kūppiṭuka viṭuttār pe ṇikkar kaccāppuṭaiyar pāvayal niṉrur tirunaIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.787 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
